content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach makes several visible linguistic reads — naming the 'closing of a door' in turn 2, catching 'I'd deal with it' before the question landed in turn 4, surfacing the dropped thread in turn 10, and catching the immediate self-rebuttal after 'no floor' in turn 12. These are real reads, named before the question, which is better than blind inquiry. However, the reads are consistently linguistic/content-level, not somatic or stance-level. The coach never names what's most operatively present: the dissociation-in-the-room, the flatness, the 'happiness filter,' the easy smiles and steady tone that ARE the signal. The client repeatedly reports 'nothing behind it,' 'comes up empty,' 'drifts,' 'goes' — and the coach treats these as content to inquire into rather than as the numbness-layer showing up live. Turn 14 ('where are you checking?') is the closest the coach gets to a somatic/locational read, but it's still framed as a question rather than a named observation of the flatness itself. Pattern-level reads (disassociation-as-numbness-layer, the-happiness-filter) are missed. This is competent linguistic tracking without AoA-specific somatic/stance reading.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names a linguistic read ('closing of a door before I even knocked') before inquiring — good read-before-question form, but stays at content level."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the pre-emptive 'I'd deal with it' — a real linguistic read of defendedness, though not named as such."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reflects client's phrase but doesn't name a read; pure content tracking."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reflects content; no read of how the client is showing up."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the dropped thread, which is a real read of the dissociation moment — but doesn't name it as dissociation or flatness, treats it as recoverable content."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the immediate intellectual rebuttal pattern ('explained why that shouldn't bother you') — a stance-adjacent read."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gets closer to somatic read ('where are you checking?') but still doesn't name the flatness/numbness that is visibly present in the client's repeated 'coming up empty.'"}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer"],
  "notes": "Coach has decent linguistic micro-tracking but misses the dominant somatic/energetic signal: the easy smiles, steady tone, and repeated 'nothing there' that ARE the numbness layer in real time. A score 3 would require naming that flatness as a felt quality, not just chasing the dropped thread."
}
